prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约8117名→7583名→7655名→6950名→5985名，整体呈持续上升趋势（位次数字逐年减小），近3年累计前移约1670名，2025年基 准位次约5985名，反映出南航在江苏物理类考生中的竞争热度持续增强；该校在江苏物理类招生计划2021年378人、2022年422人、2023年359人、2024年370人、 2025年338人，2026年计划大幅增至465人，较2025年扩招约37.6%，扩招幅度显著，对位次有推后效应。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南京航空航天大学为211工程、双一流建设高校， 软科中国大学主榜排名约第36–37名，近年排名稳定，属于国内顶尖理工类高校，在国防七子中具有突出地位；2025年声誉评价偏正面，投档线稳步提升（从211 第14名升至第3名），入选国家卓越工程师学院计划，保研率提升至27%；抖音热度排名第61位（一般），但作为国防七子之一持续获得较高关注。2026年声誉信号中涉及实验室安 全事件，但属历史偶发，整体报考热度未受明显冲击；拥有力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工 程A-、软件工程A-等7个A-及以上学科，航空航天类、电子信息类、计算机类等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信（高热推 荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）、计算机类（推荐）等南航核心工科专业社会热度持续走高；江苏省2026年普通高考总人数约52.1万人，较2025年（约35.8万人）大幅增 长，物理类考生估算约38万人，增幅约45.6%，竞争显著加剧；南航位于江苏省南京市，为本省考生提供了地域便利和就 业区位优势，本省招生计划占比较高，省内考生报考意愿较强。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5985名、2026年物理类大幅扩招37.6%、江苏省物 理类考生大幅增长约45.6%（竞争加剧抵消部分扩招效应）、学校声誉正面及优势学科吸引力强等因素，预测2026年物理类最低位次约7284名，区间678 4–7784名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 8117 → 7583 → 7655 → 6950 → 5985, showing a continuous upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year). Over the past 3 years, the ranking has moved forward by about 1670 places, with a baseline ranking of approximately 5985 in 2025, reflecting the increasing competition intensity for NUAA among Jiangsu Physics Category candidates. The enrollment plan for Physics Category at this university was 378 in 2021, 422 in 2022, 359 in 2023, 370 in 2024, and 338 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly increases to 465, an expansion of about 37.6% compared to 2025, which has a notable effect of pushing rankings backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university, ranking approximately 36–37th in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking, with stable rankings in recent years. It is a top-tier science and engineering university in China, with a prominent position among the 'Seven Sons of National Defense.' In 2025, its reputation evaluation is generally positive, with the admission score line steadily rising (from 14th to 3rd among 211 universities). It has been selected for the National Excellent Engineer Education Program, and the graduate school recommendation rate has increased to 27%. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), but as one of the 'Seven Sons of National Defense,' it continues to receive high attention. In 2026, reputation signals include a laboratory safety incident, but this is a historical accident, and overall application enthusiasm has not been significantly impacted. It has 7 A- or higher disciplines: Mechanics (A), Mechanical Engineering (A), Management Science and Engineering (A), Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology (A-), Control Science and Engineering (A-), Information and Communication Engineering (A-), and Software Engineering (A-). Enrollment majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, and Computer Science are highly matched with its advantageous disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors at NUAA, such as Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended), and Computer Science (recommended), continue to see rising social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the Jiangsu general college entrance examination is approximately 521,000, a significant increase from about 358,000 in 2025. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 380,000, an increase of about 45.6%, significantly intensifying competition. NUAA is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu Province, providing regional convenience and employment location advantages for local candidates. The proportion of enrollment plans for local candidates is relatively high, and the willingness of candidates within the province to apply is strong.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 5985 in 2025, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment by 37.6% in 2026, the substantial increase in Jiangsu Physics Category candidates by about 45.6% (increased competition partially offsetting the expansion effect), the positive university reputation, and the strong appeal of advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 7284, with a range of 6784–7784.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is approximately 7284, with a range of 6784–7784. It is recommended that candidates within this ranking range primarily apply for Tier 2 majors (Aerospace AI Composite Innovation Class, Automation, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), use Tier 1 majors (Changkong Innovation Class, Top-notch Innovation Class) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<6784) can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors. NUAA's core engineering majors such as Aerospace, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering are highly matched with its advantageous disciplines, offering good employment prospects.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（分化观望）、 会计/财务/审计（推荐）、金融/财经/经济（分化观望）等文科类专业社会热度分化；江苏省2026年历史类考生估算约14.1万人，较2025年（约9.7万人）增幅约45.7%，竞争显著 加剧；南航位于南京，为本省文科考生提供优质地域资源和就业区位优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次3092名 、2026年历史类招生计划微扩1.2%、历史类考生大幅增长约45.7%（竞争显著加剧）、学校品牌效应正面等因素，预测2026年历史 类最低位次约3084名，区间2621–3547名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 3955 → 4079 → 3786 → 3225 → 3092, showing a fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 687 places in the last 3 years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 3092 in 2025; the enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangsu was 135 in 2021, 150 in 2022, 150 in 2023, 168 in 2024, 170 in 2025, and 172 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 1.2% compared to 2025, with the plan remaining basically stable.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class, ranked approximately 36–37 on the Soft Science main list, a top-tier science and engineering university, also strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates; reputation in 2025 is generally positive, with steadily increasing admission thresholds; Douyin popularity is average; the 2026 reputation signal involves a laboratory safety incident but falls within the science and engineering domain, with limited impact on liberal arts admissions; NUAA's advantageous disciplines are mainly in engineering, and liberal arts majors (law, accounting, finance, English, administrative management, etc.) do not have directly corresponding A-class discipline ratings, but relying on the overall 211 platform and Nanjing's regional advantages, these liberal arts majors remain competitive.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law (differentiated wait-and-see), Accounting/Finance/Audit (recommended), Finance/Economics/Economy (differentiated wait-and-see) and other liberal arts majors show social popularity differentiation; the estimated number of History Category candidates in Jiangsu in 2026 is about 141,000, an increase of about 45.7% compared to 2025 (about 97,000), significantly intensifying competition; NUAA is located in Nanjing, providing high-quality regional resources and employment location advantages for local liberal arts candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 3092, a slight expansion of 1.2% in the 2026 History Category enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 45.7% in History Category candidates (sharply intensified competition), and a positive school brand effect, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 3084, with a range of 2621–3547.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 3084, range 2621–3547. It is recommended that candidates within the range focus on Tier 2 majors (Accounting, English, Administrative Management), use Tier 1 majors (Accounting New Liberal Arts Innovation Class, Law) as reach options, and Tier 3 majors (Finance, Business Administration) as safety options. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower bound (<2621) can focus on reaching for Tier 1 majors. Although NUAA's liberal arts majors lack direct A-class discipline support, they offer strong employment competitiveness due to the 211 platform and Nanjing's regional advantages.
